debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
net : BiasedHopfieldNetwork n
x : HopfieldState n
i : Fin n
⊢ biasedUpdateState n net x i ≠ x → biasedLocalField n net x i ≠ 0 → biasedEnergyDiff n net x i < 0

failed_attempts:
intro h_state_changed h_lf_nonzero
  rw [biasedEnergyDiff_eq_neg_spinDiff_biasedLocalField]
  have h_spin_diff : (biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal ≠ 0 := by
    intro h_eq
    apply h_state_changed
    ext j
    by_cases hij : j = i
    · subst hij
      simp only [biasedUpdateState, Function.update_same] at h_eq ⊢
      have h_lf := biasedLocalField net x i
      split_ifs with h1 h2
      · simp only [SpinState.toReal] at h_eq
        cases hxi : x i <;> simp [hxi, SpinState.toReal] at h_eq
      · simp only [SpinState.toReal] at h_eq
        cases hxi : x i <;> simp [hxi, SpinState.toReal] at h_eq
      · rfl
    · simp only [biasedUpdateState, Function.update_noteq (Ne.symm hij)]
  have h_same_sign : ((biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal) * biasedLocalField net x i > 0 := by
    simp only [biasedUpdateState, Function.update_same]
    have h_lf := biasedLocalField net x i
    split_ifs with h1 h2
    · have : SpinState.up.toReal - (x i).toReal ≥ 0 := by
        cases hxi : x i <;> simp [SpinState.toReal]
      have : SpinState.up.toReal - (x i).toReal > 0 := by
        cases hxi : x i <;> simp [SpinState.toReal]
        exfalso
        apply h_state_changed
        ext j
        by_cases hij : j = i
        · subst hij
          simp only [biasedUpdateState, Function.update_same, h1, ite_true, hxi]
        · simp only [biasedUpdateState, Function.update_noteq (Ne.symm hij)]
      exact mul_pos this h1
    · have : SpinState.down.toReal

    · exact absurd h hlf
    · left; exact h
  have hspindiff_ne : (biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal

intro hne hlf
  rw [biasedEnergyDiff_eq_neg_spinDiff_biasedLocalField]
  have hne_i : (biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal ≠ (x i).toReal := by
    intro heq
    apply hne
    unfold biasedUpdateState
    simp only [Function.update_same]
    ext j
    by_cases hij : j = i
    · subst hij
      simp only [Function.update_same]
      cases hpos : (0 < biasedLocalField net x i) with
      | true =>
        simp [hpos]
        have : (biasedUpdateState net x i i) = SpinState.up := by
          unfold biasedUpdateState
          simp [Function.update_same, hpos]
        rw [this] at heq
        exact SpinState.toReal_injective heq.symm
      | false =>
        simp at hpos
        cases hneg : (biasedLocalField net x i < 0) with
        | true =>
          have : (biasedUpdateState net x i i) = SpinState.down := by
            unfold biasedUpdateState
            simp [Function.update_same]
            simp only [hpos, ↓reduceIte, hneg]
          rw [this] at heq
          exact SpinState.toReal_injective heq.symm
        | false =>
          simp at hneg
          have : biasedLocalField net x i = 0 := le_antisymm hpos hneg
          exact absurd this hlf
    · simp [Function.update_noteq (Ne.symm hij)]
  have hdiff_ne : (biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr hne_i
  apply neg_neg_of_pos
  apply mul_pos_of_ne_zero_of_ne_zero hdiff_ne hlf
  ·

          have : SpinState.down.toReal = (x i).toReal := h
          cases hx : x i <;> simp_all [SpinState.toReal]
    · simp only [Function.update_noteq (Ne.symm hji)]
  have hSpinDiffReal : (biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal

intro hStateChange hLocalFieldNonzero
  rw [biasedEnergyDiff_eq_neg_spinDiff_biasedLocalField]
  have hSpinDiff : (biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal ≠ 0 := by
    intro h
    apply hStateChange
    ext j
    by_cases hij : j = i
    · subst hij
      simp only [biasedUpdateState, Function.update_same] at h ⊢
      have : (if 0 < biasedLocalField net x i then SpinState.up
              else if biasedLocalField net x i < 0 then SpinState.down
              else x i).toReal = (x i).toReal := by linarith
      cases hSign : (x i) <;> simp_all [SpinState.toReal]
      all_goals {
        split_ifs at this with h1 h2
        all_goals simp_all [SpinState.toReal]
      }
    · simp [biasedUpdateState, Function.update_noteq (Ne.symm hij)]
  have hSameSign : ((biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal) * biasedLocalField net x i > 0 := by
    simp only [biasedUpdateState, Function.update_same]
    split_ifs with h1 h2
    · have : SpinState.up.toReal - (x i).toReal ≥ 0 := by
        cases x i <;> simp [SpinState.toReal]
      have hne : SpinState.up.toReal - (x i).toReal ≠ 0 := by
        simp only [biasedUpdateState, Function.update_same] at hSpinDiff
        simp_all
      linarith [sq_pos_of_pos h1]
    · have : SpinState.down.toReal - (x i).toReal ≤ 0 := by
        cases x i <;> simp [SpinState.toReal]
      have hne : SpinState.down.toReal - (x i).toReal ≠ 0 := by
        simp only [biasedUpdateState, Function.update_same] at hSpinDiff
        simp_all
      have hneg : biasedLocalField net x i < 0 := h2
      nlinarith
    · exfalso
      push_neg at h1 h2
      have : biasedLocalField net x i = 0 := le_antisymm h2 h1
      exact hLocalFieldNonzero

intro hne hlf_ne
  rw [biasedEnergyDiff_eq_neg_spinDiff_biasedLocalField]
  have h_update := biasedUpdateState net x i
  unfold biasedUpdateState at hne
  simp only [ne_eq] at hne
  have h_spin_diff_ne : (biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal ≠ 0 := by
    intro h_eq
    apply hne
    unfold biasedUpdateState
    simp only [Function.update_same]
    by_cases h_pos : 0 < biasedLocalField net x i
    · simp only [h_pos, ↓reduceIte]
      have : SpinState.up.toReal - (x i).toReal = 0 → x i = SpinState.up := by
        intro heq
        simp only [SpinState.toReal] at heq
        cases x i <;> simp_all
      ext j
      by_cases hj : j = i
      · subst hj
        simp only [Function.update_same]
        simp only [h_pos, ↓reduceIte]
        unfold biasedUpdateState at h_eq
        simp only [Function.update_same, h_pos, ↓reduceIte] at h_eq
        exact (this h_eq).symm
      · simp only [Function.update_noteq hj]
    · push_neg at h_pos
      by_cases h_neg : biasedLocalField net x i < 0
      · simp only [h_pos, h_neg, ↓reduceIte, ite_false]
        have : SpinState.down.toReal - (x i).toReal = 0 → x i = SpinState.down := by
          intro heq
          simp only [SpinState.toReal] at heq
          cases x i <;> simp_all
        ext j
        by_cases hj : j = i
        · subst hj
          simp only [Function.update_same]
          simp only [h_pos, h_neg, ↓reduceIte, ite_false]
          unfold biasedUpdateState at h_eq
          simp only [Function.update_same] at h_eq
          simp only [h_pos, ↓reduceIte, h_neg, ite_false] at h_eq
          exact (this h_eq).symm
        · simp only [Function.update_noteq hj]
      · push_neg at h_neg
        have : biasedLocalField net x i = 0 := le_antisymm h_pos h_neg
        contradiction
  have h_same_sign : ((biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal) * biasedLocalField net x i > 0 := by
    unfold biasedUpdateState
    simp only [Function.update_same]
    by_cases h_pos : 0 < biasedLocalField net x i
    · simp only [h_pos, ↓reduceIte]
      have : SpinState.up.toReal - (x i).toReal ≥ 0 := by
        simp only [SpinState.toReal]
        cases x i <;> simp
      have hne' : SpinState.up.toReal - (x i).toReal ≠ 0 := by
        unfold biasedUpdateState at h_eq
        simp only [Function.update_same, h_pos, ↓reduceIte] at h_eq
        exact h_eq
      exact mul_pos (lt_of_le_of_ne this (Ne.symm hne')) h_pos
    · push_neg at h_pos
      have h_neg : biasedLocalField net x i < 0 := by
        cases' (lt_or_eq_of_le h_pos) with h h
        · exact h
        · exact absurd h.symm hlf_ne
      simp only [h_pos, ↓reduceIte, h_neg, ite_false]
      have : SpinState.down.toReal

      cases hLF : decide (0 < biasedLocalField net x i) <;>
      cases hLF' : decide (biasedLocalField net x i < 0) <;>
      simp only [hLF, hLF', ↓reduceIte] at hEq ⊢
      all_goals { 
        first 
        | exact SpinState.toReal_injective hEq

    · unfold biasedUpdateState
      simp only [Function.update_noteq (Ne.symm hij)]
  have hSameSign : ((biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal) * biasedLocalField net x i > 0 := by
    unfold biasedUpdateState
    simp only [Function.update_same]
    rcases lt_trichotomy (biasedLocalField net x i) 0 with hNeg | hZero | hPos
    · simp only [hNeg, not_lt.mpr (le_of_lt hNeg), if_false, if_true]
      have : SpinState.down.toReal - (x i).toReal ≤ 0 := by
        simp only [SpinState.toReal]
        cases x i <;> norm_num
      have hStrict : SpinState.down.toReal - (x i).toReal < 0 := by
        cases hxi : x i

        · simp [SpinState.toReal]
      exact mul_pos_of_neg_of_neg hStrict hNeg
    · exact absurd hZero hNonzero
    · simp only [hPos, if_true]
      have : SpinState.up.toReal

  have h_spin_diff_nonzero : (biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal ≠ 0 := by

        intro s t h
        cases s <;> cases t <;> simp [SpinState.toReal] at h ⊢
      apply h_toReal_inj
      linarith
    have h_update_eq : biasedUpdateState net x i = x := by
      unfold biasedUpdateState
      simp only [Function.update_eq_self_iff]
      exact h_same_spin
    exact h_state_changes h_update_eq
  have h_sign : ((biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal) * biasedLocalField net x i > 0 := by
    unfold biasedUpdateState at *
    simp only [Function.update_self] at *
    by_cases h_pos : 0 < biasedLocalField net x i
    · simp only [h_pos, ↓reduceIte]

        simp only [h_pos, ↓reduceIte, h_eq, Function.update_eq_self]

      simp [SpinState.toReal, h_down]
      linarith
    · push_neg at h_pos

        cases' (lt_or_eq_of_le h_pos) with h h
        · exact h
        · exact absurd h.symm h_lf_nonzero
      simp only [h_pos, ↓reduceIte, h_neg]

intro hne hlf
  rw [biasedEnergyDiff_eq_neg_spinDiff_biasedLocalField]
  have hupdate : (biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal ≠ (x i).toReal := by
    intro heq
    apply hne
    ext j
    by_cases hij : j = i
    · subst hij
      unfold biasedUpdateState at heq ⊢
      simp only [Function.update_same] at heq ⊢
      cases hpos : (0 < biasedLocalField net x i) with
      | true =>
        simp only [hpos, ↓reduceIte] at heq
        exact SpinState.toReal_injective heq
      | false =>
        simp only [hpos, ↓reduceIte] at heq
        cases hneg : (biasedLocalField net x i < 0) with
        | true =>
          simp only [hneg, ↓reduceIte] at heq
          exact SpinState.toReal_injective heq
        | false =>
          simp only [hneg, ↓reduceIte]
    · unfold biasedUpdateState
      simp only [Function.update_noteq (Ne.symm hij)]
  have hdiff_ne : (biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal ≠ 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr hupdate
  have hsame_sign : ((biasedUpdateState net x i i).toReal - (x i).toReal) * biasedLocalField net x i > 0 := by
    unfold biasedUpdateState
    simp only [Function.update_same]
    cases hpos : (0 < biasedLocalField net x i) with
    | true =>
      simp only [hpos, ↓reduceIte]
      have : SpinState.up.toReal - (x i).toReal ≥ 0 := by
        cases x i <;> simp [SpinState.toReal]
      have hne' : SpinState.up.toReal - (x i).toReal ≠ 0 := by
        intro heq
        have : SpinState.up.toReal = (x i).toReal := by linarith
        have : x i = SpinState.up := SpinState.toReal_injective this.symm
        apply hne
        ext j
        by_cases hij : j = i
        · subst hij
          unfold biasedUpdateState
          simp only [Function.update_same, hpos, ↓reduceIte, this]
        · unfold biasedUpdateState
          simp only [Function.update_noteq (Ne.symm hij)]
      have hpos' : SpinState.up.toReal - (x i).toReal > 0 := by
        cases x i <;> simp [SpinState.toReal]
      exact mul_pos hpos' hpos
    | false =>
      simp only [hpos, ↓reduceIte]
      cases hneg : (biasedLocalField net x i < 0) with
      | true =>
        simp only [hneg, ↓reduceIte]
        have : SpinState.down.toReal - (x i).toReal ≤ 0 := by
          cases x i <;> simp [SpinState.toReal]
        have hne' : SpinState.down.toReal - (x i).toReal ≠ 0 := by
          intro heq
          have : SpinState.down.toReal = (x i).toReal := by linarith
          have : x i = SpinState.down := SpinState.toReal_injective this.symm
          apply hne
          ext j
          by_cases hij : j = i
          · subst hij
            unfold biasedUpdateState
            simp only [Function.update_same, hpos, ↓reduceIte, hneg, this]
          · unfold biasedUpdateState
            simp only [Function.update_noteq (Ne.symm hij)]
        have hneg' : SpinState.down.toReal - (x i).toReal < 0 := by
          cases x i <;> simp [SpinState.toReal]
        exact mul_pos_of_neg_of_neg hneg' hneg
      | false =>
        simp only [hneg, ↓reduceIte]
        exfalso
        apply hlf

    intro h

          have : SpinState.up.toReal - (x i).toReal = 0 := h
          simp only [SpinState.toReal] at this

        · by_cases hNeg : biasedLocalField net x i < 0
          · simp only [hPos, hNeg, ↓reduceIte, ite_false] at h
            have : SpinState.down.toReal - (x i).toReal = 0 := h
            simp only [SpinState.toReal] at this
            cases x i <;> simp at this
          · push_neg at hPos hNeg
            have : biasedLocalField net x i = 0 := le_antisymm hNeg hPos
            exact absurd this hLF
    · simp only [biasedUpdateState, Function.update_of_ne (Ne.symm hij)]

    · push_neg at hPos

      simp only [hNeg, ↓reduceIte, lt_irrefl, ite_false]

        simp only [SpinState.toReal]
